code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut sorted = true
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if has_prev
          if v < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      when None
        sorted = false
      end
    when None
      sorted = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
when None
  println("YES")
end
